steps: Submit Form 5001 to French tax authorities requesting refund of excess withholding tax on TotalEnergies SE dividends
Document that FR-NO treaty rate of 15% should apply, not the 13.5% rate BNP Paribas withheld
Provide BNP Paribas with treaty documentation and custodian statement showing EUR 3,744 overcollection
Follow up with both French authorities and BNP Paribas within 30 days for refund processing

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
